Title: Dept. Q
Actors: Matthew Goode, Chloe Pirrie, Alexej Manvelov
Plot: Carl, a former top-rated detective, is wracked with guilt following an attack that left his partner paralyzed and another policeman dead. On his return to work, Carl is assigned to a cold case that will consume his life.
Awards: Nominated for 1 Primetime Emmy. 1 nomination total
